Final lambda has no grave accent in print.
Printed text reads ἤκουσεν, not ἠκούσθη.

uncertain.note: Several superscript paragraph marks appear in print before verse-initial words; transcription omits them throughout. Unsure whether these should be treated as part of the transcription policy.

notes: Running head matches. Body is largely correct except v.16 ἤκουσεν misread as ἠκούσθη and minor accent issue at Ἰσραήλ. Apparatus has several real errors plus some formatting/line-break issues; if line-break normalization is ignored, substantive apparatus errors remain at 9 αγαθων, 17 και το, and 19 Jerusalem abbreviation.
